query:
-- Get remaining $49 services (revenue > $114) and also check for other placeholder patterns
SELECT 
  c.name as customer,
  s.serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.dataSource,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.serviceType
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.monthlyCost = 49.00 AND s.monthlyRevenue > 114.00
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue DESC;
